channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cement ramp added, 13th June
item.description:
A cement ramp has been added at the back of a shop causing a bump and an obstruction to those possibly in wheel chairs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3A, 3B, New Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Previously reported damage to road not repaired, 13th June
item.description:
Going up the hill from Ethridges house
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A row of potholes , been fixed before but now quite dangerous, 13th June
item.description:
As you exit the McDonald’s | B&M and turn left onto Kingsditch Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsditch Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide canister, 13th June
item.description:
In picking up a small fly-tip there was a Nitrous Oxide canister (670gm) included. All fly-tipped items except the canister have been bagged and put in our general waste bin. However, I do not know how to dispose of the Nitrous Oxide canister. It is ready for collection by a specialist (?) and is by our green waste bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boddington Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number of potholes on junction of Lea Road with Moorfield Road, 13th June
item.description:
Number of potholes on junction of Lea Road with Moorfield Road Photo illustrates bad area by junction but also some others but smaller about 5 metres into the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lea Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two areas of broken surface outside 4 Hebden close, 13th June
item.description:
Two areas of broken surface outside 4 Hebden close Please see attached photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hebden Close, Brockworth, Tewkesbury

item.title: Pathways completely overgrown, 13th June
item.description:
The pathway around the Green lane nature reserve are overgrown on the one side and completely overgrown on the far side with grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury

item.title: Junction of Green Street with Watermead has multiple potholes over about a 5 metre section, 13th June
item.description:
Junction of Green Street with Watermead has multiple potholes over about a 5 metre section

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth, Tewkesbury

item.title: Green Street (spur from A46) from dead end to junction with watermead is severely poor condition, 13th June
item.description:
Green Street (spur from A46) from dead end to junction with watermead is severely poor condition. There is large amount of gravel and other detritus on the highway which is a risk to cyclists

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in Green Street near boundary between 31 and 33, 13th June
item.description:
Pothole in Green Street near boundary between 31 and 33

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes in Green Street adjacent to 5-7, 13th June
item.description:
Green Street has been subject to assume Section 278 works for construction of cotswold chase development. Remainder of road is in poor condition there is a previously filled pothole which has partly broken away and ground also appears to have sunk a bit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees block the traffic lights., 13th June
item.description:
Leaving Cheltenham, the traffic lights are obscured by overgrown trees almost until you are on the lights.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big holes in the park off Paygrove Lane / Park Avenue, 13th June
item.description:
Play park between Paygrove Lane/ Park Avenue / Cypress Gardens area. Big holes which are in safe in the child’s play area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over hanging tree, 13th June
item.description:
Over hanging tree next to telephone lines. needs trimming back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole just before the giveaway section again, 13th June
item.description:
Go over the giveaway speed bump and as you swing back into the left lane it is in line with your wheel, hard to miss. Just along from this the holes in turning to pub are bad again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
